topics.title: Stern Fan Network and Archive Updates
topics.summary: The studio discusses the rivalry between different fan websites, the launch of a new uncensored archive series hosted by an archivist named Sir Hard and Thick, and upcoming promotional segments.

topics.title: Mets Performance and Prank Calls
topics.summary: The studio discusses the New York Mets' roster status and pitching concerns before transitioning to a series of prank phone calls involving adult content and scripted scenarios.

topics.title: Hostile Interactions and Football Betting
topics.summary: The show features a series of aggressive verbal exchanges with callers, including insults regarding physical appearance, followed by the discussion of football betting picks and a promotional segment for a DVD.

topics.title: John Stamos Guest Appearance
topics.summary: The studio welcomes actor John Stamos to discuss his role on ER, his personal life in Los Angeles, and past interactions with the host.

topics.title: John Stamos and Film Set Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio features John Stamos discussing his experiences on film sets, including wardrobe challenges during nude scenes, interactions with fellow actors like Don Rickles and Steve Martin, and the dynamics of working with publicists.

topics.title: Nick Carter's Relationship History
topics.summary: The studio features Nick Carter discussing his past relationships, including a brief romance with Paris Hilton and an early relationship with a woman who later became involved in a high-profile news scandal.

topics.title: Nick Carter and Aaron Carter Interview
topics.summary: The studio features Nick and Aaron Carter discussing their past relationships, interactions with celebrities like Michael Jackson and Bruce Willis, and the complexities of their family dynamic.

topics.title: Bruce Hornsby Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts interview Bruce Hornsby about his musical career, his history with the Grateful Dead, and his experiences as a former basketball player.

topics.title: Bruce Hornsby Career and Musical Origins
topics.summary: The studio features Bruce Hornsby discussing his musical beginnings, the decision to retain his publishing rights, and the inspiration behind his song "That's Just the Way It Is."

topics.title: Bruce Hornsby Performance and Red Peters Interview
topics.summary: The show features musical discussions with Bruce Hornsby regarding his solo piano work and new tracks, followed by an interview with Red Peters about his upcoming program and a new song.

topics.title: Red Peter Music and Gossip Game
topics.summary: The studio features a performance by Red Peter followed by a gossip game segment with Mike Walker involving celebrity anecdotes.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Sports Updates
topics.summary: The studio reviews various celebrity stories including a fake news segment about Harrison Ford, upcoming guest appearances by Jackie O and George Takei, and an update on Terrell Owens' health and status.

topics.title: Religious Beliefs and Current Events
topics.summary: The studio explores personal views on faith, the complexities of religious observance, and various news stories including celebrity updates and local incidents.

topics.title: Personal Anecdotes and Current Events
topics.summary: The studio covers a range of topics including personal stories about family, the film Borat, public breastfeeding protests, school shootings, 911 calls, flu prevention tips, and upcoming comedy tours.
